should_trigger.prompt: Analyze the performance of this Rails action
Find performance bottlenecks in the application
Profile the slow endpoint and suggest optimizations

should_not_trigger.prompt: Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: The page loads in 3 seconds — find out why it's so slow
After fixing the bug, also check if perf needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Check for N+1 queries in the users controller
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
